productSeed.one_sentence_seed: Done-for-you AI virtual try-on launch service for Shopify fashion brands.
productSeed.founder_intent: Use the Thoughtseed growth engine to run Fitcheck as the first supervised product branch.
productSeed.target_customer: Shopify fashion brands that need shoppers to visualize fit before purchase.
productSeed.pain_or_desire: Product pages lose conversion because shoppers cannot picture garments on their own body.
productSeed.offer: Managed virtual try-on pilot with personalized renders, Shopify widget, credits, and launch support.
productSeed.survival_metric: One qualified merchant completes a demo or reservation flow.
productSeed.better_than_survival_metric: One merchant pilot goes live with tracked widget events and branch proof packet.
productSeed.GTM_channel: Shopify-first outbound, founder-led demo renders, cofounder-operated pilot sales.
productSeed.constraints: ROI-first, privacy-aware, no fake lift claims, no app-store approval claim until approved.
productSeed.third_party_apps: Shopify, Vercel, GitHub, AWS App Runner, Cloudflare/R2/Cortex, Dodo Payments, Composio when brokered or portable.
productSeed.autonomy_boundary: Semi-autonomous routines can recommend and draft; founder approval gates remain required for submission, payments, customer contact, spend, and public claims.
productSeed.approvals: Shopify submission, privacy/legal wording, Dodo activation/refunds, customer outreach, live merchant install, public proof/case-study claims.

promotion.rule: Vantyx is currently `supervised-branch`. The ladder remains `proof-only -> supervised branch -> autonomous branch`. Do not call Vantyx autonomous until second-client dogfood, tenant proof, live admin/login checks, analytics/email proof, and Cambium/Plexus foldback are complete.

productSeed.one_sentence_seed: Living 360 degree tour platform for view-led real-estate developers selling floor-by-floor views before and during construction.
productSeed.founder_intent: Turn Vantyx into a repeatable tenant onboarding and publish/rollback branch inside Cambium.
productSeed.target_customer: View-led property developers and sales or marketing teams; secondary users are visualization and digital marketing agencies serving developers.
productSeed.pain_or_desire: Development teams need immersive sales tours that can be updated without downtime as views, plans, or content change.
productSeed.offer: Premium branded tour per project on `<slug>.tryvantyx.space`, with public viewer, per-tenant admin, operator console, upload/draft/publish/rollback, and Cloudflare edge hosting.
productSeed.survival_metric: One real second tenant is onboarded through the documented tenant flow and served publicly.
productSeed.better_than_survival_metric: Second tenant deploys with health proof, rollback proof, analytics confirmation, and Cambium/Plexus proof reporting.
productSeed.GTM_channel: Developer-led demos, project-specific immersive references, and agency/developer partnerships.
productSeed.constraints: Keep tenant config scoped; do not read local env files into packets; treat production secrets as Wrangler secrets only.
productSeed.third_party_apps: Cloudflare Workers, KV, R2, Access, Custom Domains, Turnstile, Wrangler, PostHog, Resend, GitHub Actions, Bun, React/Vite/Tailwind/Zod, Pannellum.
productSeed.autonomy_boundary: Supervised SaaS branch until second-client dogfood, live login checks, and proof reporting exist.
productSeed.approvals: New tenant creation, custom domain changes, production deploy, analytics/email activation, customer-facing claims.

productSeed.one_sentence_seed: Tenant-scoped business-operations layer that routes apps, knowledge, judgment, and orchestration through auditable approval-gated flows.
productSeed.founder_intent: Bind Snow Gloves OS into Cambium as the Will-organ service for tenant operations and GTM routines.
productSeed.target_customer: Internal operator/founder plus tenant businesses; inspected tenant surfaces include `tryambakam-noesis` and a provisioned `mathis` property-listing use case.
productSeed.pain_or_desire: Tenant operations need scoped connectors, audit logs, task routing, and human approval before high-risk actions.
productSeed.offer: Onboard a tenant, bind scoped connectors, ingest sources, route events through agents, create Paperclip tasks, queue when Paperclip is down, redact audit logs, and require approvals.
productSeed.survival_metric: One tenant runs through a clean smoke with approval-gated task creation and redacted audit evidence.
productSeed.better_than_survival_metric: One tenant runs a live approved GTM routine with Paperclip/Hermes proof foldback.
productSeed.GTM_channel: Internal Will-organ enablement first, then tenant-specific GTM operation after approval.
productSeed.constraints: Treat as organ-service; no standalone app autonomy claim; tenant isolation and approvals remain non-negotiable.
productSeed.third_party_apps: Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Drive, Slack, PMS, accounting, HRIS, Explee proxy, NVIDIA NIM embeddings, Paperclip, Hermes local bus, GitHub Actions/Releases, Tauri updater/signing.
productSeed.autonomy_boundary: Agents can route and queue work; high-risk capabilities require human approval and runtime proof.
productSeed.approvals: Connector activation, tenant source binding, high-risk actions, live GTM sends, spend, and production release.

promotion.rule: IVerif is currently `proof-only`. The ladder remains `proof-only -> supervised branch -> autonomous branch`. Do not promote or automate IVerif until claim/proof separation, privacy/security evidence, successful wiki build/route proof, and explicit operator approval are complete.

productSeed.one_sentence_seed: AI document validation for EU energy subsidy operators, focused on catching dossier errors before subsidy submission.
productSeed.founder_intent: Preserve IVerif as a proof-only candidate until public claims, compliance evidence, and route/build proof are separated and verified.
productSeed.target_customer: Energy subsidy operators, compliance teams, and regulatory auditors handling CEE, BEG, ECO4, and related EU subsidy dossiers.
productSeed.pain_or_desire: Operators need to reduce dossier errors and produce auditable validation before subsidy submission.
productSeed.offer: SaaS/API dossier validation with AI document checks, programme-rule validation, audit trails, managed onboarding, and reporting/export workflows.
productSeed.survival_metric: One source-linked claim review identifies which claims are supportable, blocked, or no-signal.
productSeed.better_than_survival_metric: Wiki/product route builds cleanly and one operator-approved validation workflow is evidenced without compliance overclaim.
productSeed.GTM_channel: Compliance/operator research and proof-led pilot conversations only after claim review.
productSeed.constraints: No automation before claim/proof separation; no compliance/security/performance claim without direct evidence.
